title: Vocabulary Canonical Type
description: One row from Vocabulary_Library_v1.0.xlsx sheet Canonical_Types. This is reference data for document identification only; it does not define extraction anchors, regulatory requirements, or verification rules.

canonical_type_id.description: Stable canonical document type identifier. This is the primary key that downstream classification outputs should use.

canonical_name.description: Human-readable name for this canonical document type.

definition.description: Business definition of the canonical document type.

data_category.description: High-level evidence/data category controlled by the Vocabulary Library workbook. Examples may include activity_data, calculation_workbook, emission_factor, supporting_evidence, methodology_document, attestation, or other.

ghg_scope.description: GHG scope or applicability label when relevant. Null when not scope-specific.

content_inventory_coarse.description: Coarse inventory/content class used by classification and engagement setup.

common_aliases.description: Optional aliases. Current workbook values may be pipe-delimited strings; future loaders may normalize to arrays.

source_basis.description: Basis/source for including this canonical type, if provided in the workbook.

source_version.description: Version of the source vocabulary/library row.

last_reviewed.description: Last review date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

examples.definition: Utility bill or statement evidencing natural gas activity data for a facility or account.
